title: cassia verbenensis
intro: Cassia verbenensis, also known as Senna auriculata, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cassia verbenensis include treating various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential in reducing stress and anxiety levels. Cassia verbenensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, as well as being used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat a variety of health conditions.
